name: soloterm-agent-org-codex
description: Codex package for the full Skylence agent org: bundles the Solo MCP server (the board/PTY/timer substrate every role depends on) plus orchestrator, planner, replacer, org-audit, solo-worker conduct, the capacity-check spawn gate, build-slot serializer, execpolicy rules, ghost-probe and capacity-probe helpers, and Codex lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Full Skylence agent-org skills and Codex hooks.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native companion to the Claude Code agent-org plugin. It packages the shared orchestrator, planner, replacer, org-audit, and capacity-check skills from the Claude package, keeps the Codex solo-worker variant, and includes AGENTS.md guidance, execpolicy rules for build-slot and nextest safety, helper scripts used by Solo-orchestrated lanes (build-slot, ghost-probe, capacity-probe), and Codex lifecycle hooks for SessionStart steering plus PreToolUse build-slot checks.
defaultPrompt: Invoke orchestrator and plan worker lanes.
Invoke solo-worker and read my todo brief.
Run an org-audit of the current board.
